name: TB4-Spare-Parts-Catalogue-V1.docx
content:
What spare parts are available for the King TB4 tablet counter?

The King TB4 tablet counter was discontinued in 2000, but C.E. King continues to supply a range of spare parts for this popular legacy machine. Parts are available through the king.parts online store.

Details

The TB4 remains widely used across pharmaceutical and nutraceutical facilities worldwide, with many machines still in active production after 20–30+ years of service. The following parts are commonly requested:

  • Dispensing cones (multiple sizes): Part numbers B.TB.13377, B.TB.13378, B.TB.13379
  • Glass counting discs: Part TB00150B — fits all TB4 models
  • Motor brushes: replacement brushes for the internal motor (typically replaced annually)
  • Friction discs: approximately 42mm wide with internal tabs
  • Tablet guides (upper and lower): available in various diameters
  • Flap springs and mechanical components
  • Electrical components including sensors (limited availability for older serial numbers)
  • To identify parts: provide your TB4 serial number from the black and silver plate on the rear of the base cabinet
  • TB4 machines manufactured before 1995 are pre-CE marking and will not have CE certificates
  • The year of manufacture can be determined from the serial number — contact support@ceking.com
  • If a specific part is no longer available, the team will advise on alternatives where possible
  • For parts not listed on the website, email support@ceking.com with part description or photo

Useful link:

Browse TB4 Spare Parts on king.parts
